_note: Per-task provider/model overrides are supported under tasks..provider and tasks..model — only effective when premium license has 'llm_routing' feature (see #225, samuel/core/license.py). Without license: overrides are ignored and the default provider handles all tasks. Per-task system_prompt resolves via 4-stage cascade (model > provider > generic > package) — see samuel/adapters/llm/prompts.py:load_system_prompt (#338).
